name: Knock
description: Choose an object that you can see within range — a door, a box, a chest, a set of manacles, a padlock, or another object that contains a mundane or magical means that prevents access. A target held shut by a mundane lock or that is stuck or barred becomes unlocked, unstuck, or unbarred. If the object has multiple locks, only one of them is unlocked. The spell can defeat one magical lock (Arcane Lock or similar). The sound of the spell is loud enough to be heard from up to 300 feet away.
